title: Children of Hiroshima
actors: Nobuko Otowa, Osamu Takizawa, Masao Shimizu
plot: Post war Hiroshima: It's been four years since the last time she visited her hometown. Takako faces the after effects of the A-bomb when she travels around the city to call on old friends.
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award1 win & 1 nomination total
